title: Advanced HeroQuest - Let's Play - Part Three
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kr9WECLcJWU

Recorded on the first morning of vacation — and you can hear the enthusiasm. Daniel dives back into his Advanced HeroQuest campaign for Part Three, pushing his heroes deeper into the dungeon while juggling Skyrim mods and analog gaming ambitions in equal measure.

The Skaven resistance stiffens as the party closes in on the stolen lantern. Combat gets messy, reinforcement rolls add pressure, and the procedural dungeon system continues to deliver the kind of emergent storytelling that makes this game sing. A few rules get bent, a few dice betray expectations, and the campaign marches on.

----

What's your ideal vacation gaming lineup — one big campaign or a stack of shorter games?
